summary: Second regression pass on NEURA. Backend: 10/10 pytest pass (added webhook-signature rejection test). LIVE Stripe price IDs now valid — POST /api/billing/create-checkout-session returns a real https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_live_… URL (status 200, verified end-to-end from the UI). Webhook with no Stripe-Signature header is correctly rejected with HTTP 400 (signature verification active). All three Claude endpoints (/api/ai/chat, /api/ai/insight, /api/ai/forecast) return valid payloads (insight 200, forecast returns 30 dated cells with level low|med|high, chat returns a Claude reply). Frontend: logged in as the pre-seeded onboarded test user (neuratest4r31cbzp@gmail.com / Neura!Test2026) and landed directly on Galaxy (no onboarding loop). Galaxy shows 'Hello, Test User', stress badge 'Stress · Low', zone pills (Health 1 / Work 0 / Self 0) and the NEURA INSIGHT bar populated by Claude. Tasks tab: opened add-task modal, created TEST_regression_task (Work, med urgency, 2026-12-31, notes), it appeared under Work, toggled complete (opacity dimmed), deleted it (gone from list). AI tab: Pro lock card with 'Upgrade to Pro' visible (ai-upgrade-button), input is non-editable (editable={!isFree}). Forecast tab: pro-upgrade-overlay shown with Upgrade to Pro · €9/mo button. Settings: profile (Test User / email / UTC), FREE plan badge, Upgrade plan button, Privacy + Terms, Sign out, Delete account — all visible. Sign out → returns to login screen. Upgrade modal: Free / Pro €9 / Family €15 visible; tapping 'Upgrade to Pro' triggers POST /api/billing/create-checkout-session and Stripe redirect (200 response captured).

integration_issues.flow: AI tab — free user tap behaviour
integration_issues.issue: Spec says 'tapping the input or send button should open the upgrade modal'. Current implementation just sets editable={!isFree} on the TextInput and leaves the send button disabled (input is empty so send is no-op). Result: tapping the locked input/send does nothing — user must explicitly tap the 'Upgrade to Pro' button inside the Pro-lock card. AI is never called (the contract is honoured), but the discoverability nudge specified is missing. Minor UX.

Spec says 'locked overlay with grid behind it'. The forecast-calendar-grid View is rendered but for free users the days[] array is empty (loadForecast returns nothing when isLocked), so visually there is no 30-cell preview behind the lock card — just the lock overlay on a blank screen. Recommend always fetching the 30 cells from /api/ai/forecast and only gating interaction via overlay so the visual teaser is preserved.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated — replace with boxShadow (cosmetic, RN-web parity).
Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated — migrate to style.pointerEvents (cosmetic).

action_items: LOW (UX polish): In /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/ai.tsx make the TextInput remain editable but on focus AND on chat-send-button press, call setUpgrade(true) instead of send() when isFree — matches the spec 'tap input or send should open upgrade modal'.
LOW (UX polish): In /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/forecast.tsx call /api/ai/forecast even when isLocked so the 30-day grid renders behind the lock overlay as a teaser.
LOW: Replace shadow*/props.pointerEvents with the new RN-web equivalents to silence console warnings (carried over from iteration 1).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py — webhook signature verification is now active and properly returns HTTP 400 on missing/invalid Stripe-Signature header (verified by new pytest case test_webhook_no_signature_rejected). The 'no secret configured' branch is now dead code in production since STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is set — fine, kept for local dev.

/app/backend/server.py reads STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID / STRIPE_FAMILY_PRICE_ID at import time with os.environ[...]; if missing the process will crash on startup. Fail-fast is acceptable, just document for deployment.

/app/frontend/app/auth/login.tsx — Google OAuth redirectTo uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (the FastAPI host). Works in this preview but in production should be the app's deep-link scheme or web origin (carried over from iteration 1).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_neura_backend.py (added test_webhook_no_signature_rejected — TestBilling now has 4 tests, suite total 10)

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 pytest pass — health, config, ai insight/forecast/chat, ai chat empty rejection, billing checkout pro, billing checkout invalid plan, billing portal 404, webhook no-signature 400)
success_rate.frontend: 100% of spec'd flows verified: login → Galaxy direct, Galaxy populated (zones + stress badge + Claude insight), Tasks CRUD (create/toggle/delete), AI tab Pro lock, Forecast tab Pro lock, Settings profile+plan+links+sign out, Upgrade modal renders 3 plans, checkout-pro-button triggers /api/billing/create-checkout-session returning 200 with cs_live_ URL, sign-out returns to login. Two minor UX gaps noted (AI tap-to-upgrade discoverability, Forecast grid teaser empty).

seed_data_creation: Reused pre-seeded user from iteration 1: neuratest4r31cbzp@gmail.com / Neura!Test2026 (Supabase user id b6fffcb5-de46-4560-9256-2dfea3b902c2). During the run a transient TEST_regression_task was created in Work zone then deleted — no residual test data left in Supabase.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full app is green. Backend pytest is the regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_neura_backend.py (10 tests, run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_neura_backend.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/iteration_N.xml`). LIVE Stripe is wired — DO NOT complete a real card payment; verify only that POST /api/billing/create-checkout-session returns 200 with checkout_url starting cs_live_. Webhook now enforces signature (400 without it). All three Claude endpoints are stable (~3-8s latency). Frontend test user is fully onboarded — logging in lands directly on /galaxy. Open minor items are UX polish only (AI tap-to-upgrade nudge, Forecast grid teaser), not blockers. /app/memory/test_credentials.md should be updated to list the pre-seeded onboarded user for future agents.
rca_of_issue: No new defects detected this iteration. Iteration 1 RCAs remain valid as resolved: (a) AI 500s fixed by switching LlmChat.with_max_tokens → with_params(max_tokens=...) — Claude endpoints all 200 this run; (b) Stripe checkout 500 'No such price' fixed by replacing the placeholder price IDs with the real LIVE ones (price_1TaW1m2dxyPJTuD4RDEWQfeE / price_1TaW2X2dxyPJTuD4SQu1FwUs) — checkout session now returns cs_live_… URL.
